song.title: Highest Enjoyment
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Many nights while on my bed, I sought Him whom my soul loved for years; I sought Him, but I found Him not, I should go out and seek.|| O brothers would you tell me please, Where did my heart’s beloved go? That I may run and bring Him back, His love to enjoy once again.|| Brothers, lead me. You are my guides That in fellowship true I’d abide. Oh! My love is now by my side, Never from me did hide.
[V2] 2) Oh, how could I be Your belov’d, Filled with Spirit like pillars of smoke? Resurrected, to death conformed, Myrrh and frankincense show.|| O how could I be Your palanquin, That through me You may move and rest? As one of Israel’s mighty men, From terror to guard in the night.|| All around me are those who watch, I am safe and securely I dwell. Love, immeasur’able, poured on me, In Your likeness I’m formed.
[V3] 3) To the mountain of myrrh I go, All that’s mine I put to death; Hill of frankincense I’d ascend, Shadows flee away.|| My beauty You proclaimed most fair, The best love You enjoyed from me; Your heart I’ve ravished with one glance, My ointments excelling all spices.|| Lebanon, I come willingly, Called to live in ascension with Him; Yet in Hermon I’ll also dwell, As I boast in Your cross.
[V4] 4) May the honey from my lips Be for You the sweetness of love. May the fragrance of Lebanon From my living outflow.|| O Lord, I beg You, quickly come, My being’s occupied by You, A garden closed, a spring shut up, A fountain sealed all for Yourself.|| Wake, O north wind and come, O south, From my garden the spices do flow, To Your garden O come, Belov’d, All its fruit to enjoy.
song.author: Titus Chu
